'''Spinda Caveel''' was a rogue [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who had a nefarious plan to do some [[Droid/Legends|droid]] reprogramming of his own. 

Based on [[Murninkam]], he built a protected fortress surrounded by a [[Full-globe class-one Imperial shield]]. He was the employer of the [[Pike Sisters|Pikkel Sisters]] who stole [[A-OIC]] from [[Massad Thrumble]], and he obliged the droid to reprogram some droids to serve him. In the process of modifying an old battle droid to Caveel's specifications, Doc surreptitiously altered its programming so that it would attack Caveel at a time of Doc's choosing.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 2">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 2|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 2]]</ref> The time came when the [[Human replica droid]] [[Guri]] arrived; at first Caveel thought that the intruder would perish in the [[Kajiin Swamp]], but soon Guri entered his laboratory. After she defeated his bodyguards, Caveel moved to strike Guri and was restrained and subdued by the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] obeying Doc. Guri left with the stolen droid.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 3">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 3|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 3]]</ref>

Caveel later went with the Sisters back to [[Hurd's Moon]] to capture Doc and Guri, with caution to bring Doc unharmed, and at least Guri's head intact.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 4">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 4|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 4]]</ref> 

As the three approached Thrumble's facility they heard noise: [[Savan]] and her mercenaries [[Skirmish on Hurd's Moon|attempted]] to infiltrate it to capture Guri and were fighting with the scientist's security defenses. As they were running, they stumbled upon the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]]. They started firing but [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] deflected one with [[Luke Skywalker's green lightsaber/Legends|his lightsaber]], wounding [[Zan Pike|Zan]]. Caveel's coat was damaged by a blast from a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]]. The three retreated, with Caveel lamenting his coat, and the sisters telling him that he was [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], the most famous of his species. Caveel was curious why [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] heroes would be there and refused to leave with the terrified sisters to leave. Caveel, aware of their exploits, argued that they a matter of [[luck]], making Zan to point out their [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon|destroying]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]], [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|the]] [[Death Star II/Legends|two]] [[Death Star/Legends|Death Stars]] [[Battle of Endor/Legends|and also]] the [[Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], and [[Zu Pike|Zu]] that no amount of money could put them against "that kind of luck".

Caveel drew his [[pistol/Legends|pistol]], saying that he couldn't let anyone walk out on him, but the Sisters shot him faster. The fireshot was heard by the Heroes who came to their place to see Caveel's body lying on the floor. The sisters explained it was self-defense over a disagreement with their former employer and that they had nothing against them, before walking away.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 5">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 5|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 5]]</ref>
